heading: Definition of Restricted Data
label: 7383j Definition of Restricted Data
text: In this subchapter, the term “Restricted Data” has the meaning given that term in .section 2014(y) of this title
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle D of title XXXI of div. C of , , , which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of subtitle D to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub.
